Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(pipeline): convert batch crons to inline calls, remove dead platforms

batch-5min and batch-enrich were making HTTP sub-calls through Cloudflare
(NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL) which hit ~100s proxy timeout, or through VERCEL_URL
which was blocked by deployment protection (401). Now all sub-jobs run
inline (in-process), eliminating both failure modes.

Also removed dead/blocked platforms from batch-fetch-traders groups:
- kucoin (APIs 404, feature discontinued)
- lbank (needs session auth, crashes browser)
- bitget_spot (no public API)
- blofin (needs unconfigured env vars)

This reduces group F from 9→6 platforms, well within the 300s timeout.

commit.message:
Add category-aware recommendations and versioned data migrations

Watched entries now store {rating, category} where category is the
watchlist the item was watched from. Recommendations filter watched
seeds by category so e.g. trash movies don't pollute normal
recommendations. When watching from search, a category picker is
shown. Users can change category of watched items via /rate detail
view. /recommend without args shows a category picker.

Introduces migration.py with versioned schema migrations, replacing
inline migration checks in config.py.

commit.message:
Fix stale odds: PointsBet overrides current_odds, refresh updates live odds

Three root causes for Snobbery showing $23.80 instead of $1.70:

1. PointsBet merge only filled current_odds when empty — now overwrites
   when >3x divergence (stale tote vs fresh fixed odds)
2. Betfair divergence guard rejected correct $1.69 because opening_odds
   was $23.80 (garbage tote). Now accepts when PointsBet agrees (<2x)
3. Pre-race refresh (refresh_bet_selections) never updated requested_odds
   from live Runner data. Now refreshes odds every 30s, recalculates
   Kelly stake, and cancels bets that fall outside floor/ceiling

commit.message:
feat(engine): canonical execution-profile contract, parser frontier harness, and CI quality gates

Standardizes adaptive router lane descriptions to use the canonical
"execution profile" terminology instead of the previous engine-specific
"inspired" phrasing. This aligns the runtime descriptions with the
formal execution-profile contract.

Execution profile changes:
- execution_orchestrator.rs: "QuickJs-inspired deterministic lane" →
  "Baseline deterministic execution profile", "V8-inspired throughput
  lane" → "Baseline throughput execution profile"; adds test asserting
  no descriptions contain "inspired"
- runtime_decision_core.rs: doc comment updated to "execution-profile
  router" for consistency
- docs/rgc_execution_profile_contract_v1.json: new contract spec

Parser frontier harness (new test infrastructure):
- tests/parser_frontier_harness.rs: test that loads fixtures from JSON
  and replays parser scenarios through the evaluation pipeline
- tests/fixtures/parser_frontier_harness_v1.json: fixture data
- scripts/run_parser_frontier_harness.sh: convenience runner
- scripts/e2e/parser_frontier_harness_replay.sh: end-to-end replay script
- README.md: +23 lines documenting the Parser Frontier Harness

CI quality gates:
- tests/rgc_ci_quality_gates.rs: +13 lines of RGC CI gate assertions
- docs/RGC_CI_QUALITY_GATES.md: documents the quality gate rules
- scripts/run_rgc_ci_quality_gates.sh: CI runner script

commit.message:
feat(engine): source ingestion pipeline with SourceLanguage classification

Adds a structured source ingestion layer that classifies incoming source
code by language (JavaScript vs TypeScript) before evaluation, producing
a SourceIngestionSummary that tracks:

- Detected SourceLanguage (JavaScript/TypeScript enum with serde support)
- Whether ts_normalization was applied
- Content hashes of both original and normalized source
- Counts of TS decision points and capability intent markers

Key changes:
- ts_normalization.rs: SourceLanguage enum, SourceIngestionSummary struct,
  PreparedSourceEntry struct, classify_source_language() using label
  extension and heuristic content analysis, and
  prepare_source_entry_for_public_entrypoints() that wires classification
  into the normalization pipeline
- lib.rs: EvalOutcome gains source_ingestion field; eval() refactored to
  call prepare_source_entry_for_public_entrypoints() so every evaluation
  carries provenance metadata from ingestion through to output
- frankenctl.rs: CompileArtifact gains source_ingestion; compile command
  uses the new prepare API to surface ingestion metadata in CLI output
- frankenctl_cli.rs: +161 lines of CLI integration tests covering compile
  and eval subcommands with the new source ingestion fields
- eval_pipeline_integration.rs: +38 lines of pipeline integration tests
  verifying SourceIngestionSummary flows through correctly

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: franken_engine

commit.message:
fix: resolve global button text clipping by using minHeight instead of height

The Mantine theme set a fixed height: 42px on all buttons which clipped text
when combined with uppercase transform and letter-spacing. Changed to minHeight
so buttons can grow to fit content but won't shrink below 42px.

commit.message:
NNFT-250: Integrate feature extraction into Sense→Sharpen pipeline

Wire deterministic feature extraction into the inference pipeline and
add feature-based disambiguation rules for known confusion pairs.

- Add classify_batch_with_features to ValueClassifier trait
- Extract per-value features in classify_sense_sharpen (Step 1b)
- Compute aggregated column-level features for disambiguation
- Rule F1: leading-zero pre-filter (postal_code/cpt → numeric_code)
- Rule F2: slash-segment docker_ref detection
- Rule F3: HS code detection via digit_ratio + dot segments
- Profile eval: 178/186 format-detectable (95.7% label, 97.3% domain)

fix: use connection's own book_guid for nightly SimpleFin sync

Nightly refresh queried SimpleFin connections by a bookGuid from
books.findFirst() which could mismatch the connection's actual book.
Now queries by user_id + sync_enabled and uses each connection's
stored book_guid. Added logging for all skip conditions.

commit.message:
feat: word graph — two-tier fast semantic memory + CC→Igor bridge

- cognition/word_graph.py: in-memory word co-occurrence index; two
  traversal directions on same weights: parsing (which habit fires?)
  and generation (predict next word). TF-IDF scoring, reinforce on
  activation, JSON cache at ~/.TheIgors/word_graph.json.

- basal_ganglia.py: inject word graph at boot via set_word_graph();
  pre-score all habits with wg.score() before scoring loop; +0.10
  bonus when trigger matches; reinforce winner on every habit fire.

- main.py: build/load word graph at boot from habits; inject into
  basal_ganglia; save on shutdown; pass to dashboard render().

- tools/word_graph.py: index_text_into_word_graph + query_word_graph_stats
  tools so Igor can feed arbitrary text (source tree, books) into the graph.

- dashboard/terminal.py: show word graph vocab + doc count each render.

- reasoners/base.py: remove read_source_file/list_source_files from
  BIG_READ_TOOLS (local reads are free); only cap external API calls
  (confluence, web_search). Simplify BASH_READ_PATTERNS to curl/wget only.

- web/server.py: add POST /api/cc_send so Claude Code can inject
  messages to Igor directly (author: "claude-code"). Fix web UI sender
  name — was prepending name to message text instead of sending as
  author field; now author:"akien" arrives correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add custom exception hierarchy for HTTP errors (#8)

Introduce opennms_api_wrapper._exceptions with a typed exception tree:

  OpenNMSError (base)
  └── OpenNMSHTTPError          (.status_code, .response attributes)
      ├── BadRequestError       400
      ├── AuthenticationError   401
      ├── ForbiddenError        403
      ├── NotFoundError         404
      ├── ConflictError         409
      └── ServerError           5xx

All exceptions are exported from the top-level package so callers
can catch them without importing requests internals:

  except opennms.NotFoundError: ...

Implementation:
- _base.py: add _raise_for_status() helper; call it from _parse()
  and _get_text() instead of bare raise_for_status()
- __init__.py: export all 8 exception classes; update __all__
- tests/test_exceptions.py: 15 new tests covering hierarchy,
  attributes, all mapped status codes, catch-via-base-class,
  v2 endpoints, and _get_text paths

478 tests passing (463 existing + 15 new).

Co-authored-by: Chance Newkirk <chance.newkirk+github@pm.me>
Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix font tofu in exports, video download CSP, waveform rendering + add 345 tests

Three bug fixes:
- Font embedding now preserves unicode-range and filters to latin subsets,
  preventing librsvg from picking cyrillic-ext (no Latin glyphs) for text
- Added blob: to CSP script-src for FFmpeg.wasm toBlobURL compatibility
- Waveform uses useLayoutEffect with retry timers to handle AnimatePresence
  mount animations where canvas width is momentarily 0

Adds font-embed.ts module for server-side Google Font woff2 embedding in SVG,
plus 10 new test files (345 tests) covering export pipeline integration,
visual regression, font embedding, SVG overlay, HEIC input, payload size,
preview-export consistency, publish panel, and video smoke tests.
